product_results.title: Abboos Womens Slip On Sneakers Women Walking Tennis Shoes Lightweight Casual Sneakers for Gym Travel Work

summary.text: Customers find these shoes very comfortable and describe them as the most comfortable shoes they own. The fit receives praise, with customers noting a perfect fit and that the width is perfect. The shoes are considered good quality and great overall. Customers appreciate the nice looking appearance, particularly mentioning they love the sapphire shoe. The color and ease of use also receive positive feedback. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding traction and foot support.

authors_reviews.title: LOVE THE SAPPHIRE SHOE!!!
authors_reviews.text: Abboos women's sapphire blue shoes. These shoes are SUPER comfortable. They didn't have my exact size (7.5) so I ordered an 8 cause I REALLY wanted that color of blue. But shockingly they fit like a glove. I LOVE LOVE LOVE them. In fact I think I'll buy a second pair cause (murphy's law) when I actually need another pair, they'll probably be out of stock or discontinued with my luck. Thrilled with my purchase!
authors_reviews.author: Jordhana1

authors_reviews.title: 100% recommend
authors_reviews.text: These shoes are very nice. True to size. I am a size 7-7.5 foot. I ordered size 7 and they fit perfectly. Light weight and comfortable. The souls have great grip. The supports around the foot is an added bonus. I would highly recommend these shoes. I got them in black and burgundy. Love both of the colors. 1000% great runner for walking, cardio and weight training.
authors_reviews.author: Jessica

authors_reviews.title: Confort pour grandeur
authors_reviews.text: J’aime grandeur 10 et largeur des piedsBelle couleur de bleu
authors_reviews.author: Lise langlois

authors_reviews.title: Parfait pour ortheses
authors_reviews.text: Semble de bonne qualité, les ortheses s’ajustent bien. Un peu large par contre, alors peu esthétique, Semelle bien coussinée donc confortables pour la marche. Probablement un bon achat pour le prix.
authors_reviews.author: Diane

authors_reviews.title: CHEAP LOOKING
authors_reviews.text: Cheap looking, poor quality, I am returning.
authors_reviews.author: Linda L Ross

authors_reviews.title: great shoes!
authors_reviews.text: so comfy! almost like off brand nike shoes. perfect for people with a wider foot. would definitely recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Jaelyn Foidart

authors_reviews.title: Not so easy as expected.
authors_reviews.text: I find they do not slip on and off as easily as others I have of a different brand. Also I don't think they have asmuch support either. They are fine for the price and I do like the fact that the soles are the same colour as theuppers.
authors_reviews.author: Darcy Embree

authors_reviews.title: Comfy shoes
authors_reviews.text: These are very comfortable shoes I wish I would have sized up 1 more my toes touch the very end I’m usually a size 9 women’s shoe. I would definitely size up one because they do run a bit small. Other than that, they’re pretty comfortable. I just gotta stretch them out. They’re brand new. The green color is lovely too
authors_reviews.author: Stephy
